title: Payment of compensation to persons on leave
doc_html:
§3327.  Payment of compensation to persons on leave

Compensation payable to persons on sabbatical leave shall be paid at the times at which salaries of the other members of the faculty are paid and in the same manner.

Acts 1991, No. 858, §1.
doc_text:
§3327.  Payment of compensation to persons on leave
Compensation payable to persons on sabbatical leave shall be paid at the times at which salaries of the other members of the faculty are paid and in the same manner.
Acts 1991, No. 858, §1.
